# Logo

Renders the StackTrace mark as a small, current-color SVG.

## Installation

Add Logo from the configured StackTrace registry.

```shell
npx shadcn-vue@latest add @stacktrace/logo
```

## Usage

Size the mark with width and height utilities and set its color through the surrounding text color. The SVG uses a `24 × 24` view box, has no fixed dimensions, and inherits `currentColor` for its stroke.

```vue
<template>
  <div class="flex items-center gap-4">
    <Logo class="size-12" role="img" aria-label="StackTrace" />
    <div>
      <p class="font-semibold">StackTrace UI</p>
      <p class="text-sm text-muted-foreground">Laravel and Vue components</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { Logo } from '@/Components/Logo'
</script>
```

## Accessible name

When adjacent visible text already says StackTrace, treat the mark as decorative with `aria-hidden="true"`. When it is the only product identifier, add `role="img"` and an `aria-label`. Standard SVG attributes fall through to the root element.

```vue
<Logo class="size-8" aria-hidden="true" />
<Logo class="size-8" role="img" aria-label="StackTrace" />
```

## Layout and color

Keep the aspect ratio square, avoid stretching one axis independently, and leave enough surrounding space for the mark to remain legible. Because it inherits text color, the same component works in light, dark, muted, and inverted surfaces without separate image assets.

## When to use

- Use Logo for StackTrace product identity in headers, navigation, and attribution.
- Do not use it as a generic application icon or status symbol.
- Pair it with text when the audience may not recognize the mark alone.

Hosted documentation: [Logo](https://ui.stacktrace.sk/docs/components/logo)
